title: Dashboard glob reads — rewrite server to read new context tree directly
description: After the context tree migration, the dashboard server still reads from deleted/renamed paths (state/, inbox/, done/, intelligence/, lessons.md, backlog.md, features/active/done/). Rewrite ALL server, script, MCP, and frontend code to glob source files directly from the new structure. Kill the indexer (index-state.ts) — dashboard reads goal.json, project.json, directive.json, backlog.json directly.

dod.criterion: Dashboard loads and renders all 3 pages (dashboard, projects, insights) with real data from .context/
Zero references to state/, inbox/, done/, intelligence/, backlog.md, features/ in server/, scripts/, mcp-server/
MCP tools (status, backlog, directive) return correct data from new paths
Foreman scheduler can find and launch directives from directives/ directory

tasks.title: Rewrite work-item-types.ts — update TypeScript types for new entity shapes
tasks.output: Added hasGoalJson, category to GoalRecord schema

tasks.title: Rewrite state-watcher.ts — glob goal.json/project.json/directive.json/backlog.json directly instead of reading state/*.json
tasks.output: Full rewrite: reads source files directly, builds FullWorkState via glob pattern

tasks.title: Update context-watcher.ts — remove from server (dead code, no longer imported)
tasks.output: Removed ContextWatcher import and instantiation from server/index.ts

tasks.title: Update goal-watcher.ts — watch goal.json files instead of inventory.json
tasks.output: Full rewrite: reads goal.json, project.json, backlog.json directly

tasks.title: Rewrite server/index.ts — update foreman functions to read from directives/ and backlog.json
Update scripts/index-state.ts — read from directives/ and intel/ instead of conductor/inbox/ and intelligence/
tasks.output: Updated parseConductorArtifacts to read flat directives/, intel/ path, added triaged/completed status mapping

tasks.title: Update scripts/foreman.ts — read directives/ instead of inbox/, read backlog.json instead of backlog.md, fix lessons path
tasks.output: Rewrote findReadyWork (JSON reads), checkTrigger (directives/ check), launchDirective (lessons/ path), removed markdown backlog parsing

tasks.title: Update scripts/intelligence-trends.ts — intel/ path, update proposals.log location
Rewrite mcp-server/tools/ — status.ts (glob source), backlog.ts (read/write JSON), directive.ts (read directives/ not inbox/)
tasks.output: Full rewrite of status.ts, backlog.ts, directive.ts to read from source files directly

tasks.title: Update CLI scaffolding — init.ts creates directives/ not inbox/+done/, templates reference new paths
tasks.output: Updated scaffoldContext to create directives/, reports/, intel/, lessons/ instead of conductor/inbox/done/

tasks.title: Update frontend — add hasGoalJson, category to GoalRecord type
tasks.output: Added hasGoalJson and category to src/stores/types.ts GoalRecord
